api: KYVE public Cosmos-style REST query API (https://api.korellia.kyve.network)
scope: wave1 migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (pools, stakers, funders, validators); KYVE's REST query surface has no mutation endpoints callable by an off-chain client (state changes are on-chain transactions, not synced here), so there are no write endpoints in or out of scope
